title: Exact covering number C(12,6,4)
statement: Determine the minimum number of 6-subsets of a 12-point set needed to cover every 4-subset. The maintained range is 40 <= C(12,6,4) <= 41; either a verified 40-block cover or a complete independently checked exclusion of 40 settles the exact value.
source_name: La Jolla Covering Repository, cross-checked against the maintained Covering Repository
verifiability: A positive result is a 40-block list checked directly against all 495 four-subsets. A negative result requires a deterministic symmetry-reduced encoding, an independently checked exhaustive cube/orbit cover, and replayable proof logs for every UNSAT leaf.
rationale: This is a meaningful one-bit exact design problem with 924 candidate blocks, strong forced point and pair multiplicities, a sound 10,395-fold perfect-matching quotient, compact positive certificates, and standard proof-producing SAT routes. It is the preferred easier-hard successor to R(5,5).
external_channel: La Jolla Covering Repository / Covering Repository; combinatorial-design and proof-computation venues
probability_basis: Post-pilot judgment range 0.70-0.85 for a field-usable contribution; 0.775 is a planning midpoint, not a calibrated probability. Four exact link orbits have independently checked residual exclusions and the symmetry campaign has closed 189 proof-bearing frontier leaves. Two later hard-tail diagnostics produced no closure signal but added reusable audited partition and assumption infrastructure.
exact_resolution_probability_basis: Post-hard-tail judgment range 0.40-0.60. Forty-seven canonical frontier nodes remain; biased fourth-layer smoke cases and best-effort Glucose4 incremental reuse both produced 10 UNKNOWN results, and a second independent cardinality translation is still required for a publication-grade global exclusion.
phase0_evidence: Published controls pass. Direct depth-7 cubing closed only 10/128 sampled leaves (7.8125%) and was stopped. The link-first campaign has four audited C(11,5,3) orbit classes, all four excluded by reconstructed residual CNFs and replayed external proofs; exact primary/secondary/tertiary partitions contain 189 validated proof receipts and 47 open canonical frontier nodes. A biased quaternary child-zero smoke test returned 10 UNKNOWN results; a schema-2, independently audited Glucose4 incremental diagnostic also closed 0/10 under explicitly best-effort caps. Neither is route-gate eligible and both policies are stopped unchanged.
manual_scope: Continuously operate the checkpointed C(12,6,4) campaign through bounded canonical-frontier and materially different propagation/cardinality discriminators. Preserve independent reconstruction and proof replay, serialize heavy work on the current host, pause at declared information-value gates, provision no paid burst capacity, and make no exact-value claim before complete coverage and a second cardinality validation route.

research_authorization.scope: Run the evidence-gated, checkpointed C(12,6,4) campaign continuously under existing CPU, memory, disk, correctness, and information-value limits. Completed artifacts remain durable until reviewed; no paid scaling or public mathematical claim is authorized.
